title: B002: Implement Kubernetes-interacting packages
description:
**Size:** 🏗️ large
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** high
**Feature ID:** CC-0005 (S005)

## Summary

Implement 5 new packages (`secrets/`, `database/`, `deployment/`, `job/`, `tls/`) and extend 2 existing packages (`config/`, `policy/`) in `internal/common/` with Kubernetes API interaction functions (CC-0005). These packages provide reusable create-or-update helpers with owner references, readiness checks, and idempotent behavior — consumed by all service reconcilers starting with Keystone (CC-0013/CC-0014). External CRDs (MariaDB, ESO, cert-manager) use typed Go client imports. Existing `testutil/simulators/` will be migrated from `unstructured.Unstructured` to typed clients as part of this feature. All packages require envtest integration tests verifying actual object creation and status handling.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Add typed Go module dependencies: `mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator`, `external-secrets/external-secrets`, `cert-manager/cert-manager` to `internal/common/go.mod`
- Extend `testutil/envtest.SharedScheme()` to register external operator types (MariaDB, ESO, cert-manager) alongside existing core/apps/batch groups
- Migrate existing `testutil/simulators/` functions (`SimulateMariaDBReady`, `SimulateExternalSecretSync`) from `unstructured.Unstructured` to typed structs; update their integration tests; retain `setUnstructuredReadyStatus` helper and `SimulateMemcachedReady` as-is (Memcached not in CC-0005 scope)
- Add new typed simulator functions for `Database`, `User`, `Grant`, `PushSecret`, `Certificate` CRD status transitions needed by CC-0005 integration tests
- `config/CreateImmutableConfigMap` — content-hash suffix naming (SHA256), `immutable: true`, owner references via `controllerutil.SetOwnerReference`
- `secrets/WaitForExternalSecret` — check ESO `ExternalSecret` status for `SecretSynced=True` (typed import)
- `secrets/IsSecretReady` — verify Secret exists and contains all `expectedKeys` in `.data` (variadic)
- `secrets/GetSecretValue` — read and decode a specific key from Secret `.data`
- `secrets/EnsurePushSecret` — create-or-update `PushSecret` CR (typed import) with owner reference
- `database/EnsureDatabase` — create or verify MariaDB `Database` CR (typed import), check status readiness
- `database/EnsureDatabaseUser` — create or verify MariaDB `User` + `Grant` CRs with owner references
- `database/RunDBSyncJob` — build and run a K8s Job for `db_sync`, delegates to `job.RunJob`
- `deployment/EnsureDeployment` — accepts full `*appsv1.Deployment`, sets owner reference, create-or-update, returns readiness
- `deployment/EnsureService` — accepts full `*corev1.Service`, sets owner reference, create-or-update
- `deployment/IsDeploymentReady` — pure function: `availableReplicas >= *spec.replicas`
- `job/RunJob` — create Job idempotently (skip if complete), return `(true, nil)` when `succeeded >= 1`
- `job/EnsureCronJob` — create-or-update CronJob with owner reference
- `job/IsJobComplete` — pure function: `succeeded >= 1`
- `tls/EnsureCertificate` — create-or-update cert-manager `Certificate` CR (typed import) with owner reference
- `tls/GetTLSSecret` — retrieve TLS Secret containing `tls.crt`, `tls.key`
- `policy/LoadPolicyFromConfigMap` — read ConfigMap, parse `policy.yaml` key into `map[string]string`
- `doc.go` with `Feature: CC-0005` tag for each new package
- envtest integration tests (`//go:build integration`) for every package using existing `testutil/envtest.SetupEnvTest`
- Unit tests (table-driven, gomega matchers) for pure functions (`IsDeploymentReady`, `IsJobComplete`)

**Excluded:**
- Managed vs brownfield mode branching logic (reconciler responsibility, not shared library — YAGNI)
- Connection string assembly (already in `config.InjectSecrets` from CC-0004)
- Reconciler sub-reconciler implementations (CC-0013/CC-0014)
- CRD type definitions and webhooks (CC-0011/CC-0012)
- New testutil builders beyond what CC-0002 provides (new typed simulators for CC-0005 CRDs are in-scope; new fluent builders are not)
- Migration of `SimulateMemcachedReady` to typed (Memcached not in CC-0005 scope — remains unstructured)
- Helm chart packaging, RBAC markers, controller registration (later phases)
- RabbitMQ or Memcached interaction packages (not in CC-0005 scope)
- Architecture doc update for the unstructured→typed decision (tracked separately)

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph existing["Existing Packages - CC-0004"]
        types["types/"]
        conditions["conditions/"]
        configPure["config/ pure funcs"]
        policyPure["policy/ pure funcs"]
    end

    subgraph testInfra["Test Infrastructure - CC-0002 + migration"]
        envtest["testutil/envtest/ + SharedScheme ext"]
        simulators["testutil/simulators/ - migrated to typed"]
        builders["testutil/builders/"]
        fakeCRDs["testutil/fake_crds/"]
    end

    subgraph new["New/Extended Packages - CC-0005"]
        configK8s["config/ + CreateImmutableConfigMap"]
        policyK8s["policy/ + LoadPolicyFromConfigMap"]
        secretsPkg["secrets/"]
        databasePkg["database/"]
        deploymentPkg["deployment/"]
        jobPkg["job/"]
        tlsPkg["tls/"]
    end

    subgraph k8sAPI["Core Kubernetes Resources"]
        CM["ConfigMap"]
        Secret["Secret"]
        Dep["Deployment"]
        Svc["Service"]
        Job["Job"]
        CronJob["CronJob"]
    end

    subgraph extCRDs["External Operator CRDs - typed imports"]
        MariaDB["MariaDB Database/User/Grant"]
        ESO["ExternalSecret/PushSecret"]
        CertMgr["cert-manager Certificate"]
    end

    configK8s --> CM
    policyK8s --> CM
    secretsPkg --> Secret
    secretsPkg --> ESO
    databasePkg --> MariaDB
    databasePkg --> jobPkg
    deploymentPkg --> Dep
    deploymentPkg --> Svc
    jobPkg --> Job
    jobPkg --> CronJob
    tlsPkg --> CertMgr
    tlsPkg --> Secret

    configK8s -.->|uses| configPure
    policyK8s -.->|uses| policyPure
    databasePkg -.->|uses| types
    secretsPkg -.->|uses| types
    simulators -.->|typed structs| extCRDs
    envtest -.->|registers| extCRDs
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant R as Reconciler
    participant S as secrets/
    participant DB as database/
    participant J as job/
    participant C as config/
    participant D as deployment/
    participant K8s as Kubernetes API

    R->>S: WaitForExternalSecret
    S->>K8s: Get ExternalSecret CR
    K8s-->>S: status.conditions
    S-->>R: ready=true

    R->>DB: EnsureDatabase
    DB->>K8s: Create/Update MariaDB Database CR
    K8s-->>DB: status ready
    DB-->>R: ready=true

    R->>DB: RunDBSyncJob
    DB->>J: RunJob internally
    J->>K8s: Create Job
    K8s-->>J: status.succeeded=1
    J-->>DB: complete=true
    DB-->>R: synced=true

    R->>C: CreateImmutableConfigMap
    C->>K8s: Create ConfigMap with hash suffix
    K8s-->>C: created
    C-->>R: configMapName

    R->>D: EnsureDeployment
    D->>K8s: Create/Update Deployment
    K8s-->>D: availableReplicas
    D-->>R: ready=true
```

## Key Components

- **Typed Go module imports**: Add `mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator`, `external-secrets/external-secrets`, `cert-manager/cert-manager` as dependencies in `internal/common/go.mod`. Used by production packages and migrated simulators.
- **SharedScheme extension**: Extend `testutil/envtest.SharedScheme()` to register external operator types (MariaDB `Database`/`User`/`Grant`, ESO `ExternalSecret`/`PushSecret`, cert-manager `Certificate`) so envtest's controller-runtime client can work with typed objects. The existing `fake_crds/` CRD YAML schemas remain unchanged — they define the API server schema; the scheme registration adds Go type awareness.
- **Simulator migration**: Refactor `testutil/simulators/SimulateMariaDBReady` and `SimulateExternalSecretSync` from `unstructured.Unstructured` to typed structs. Retain `setUnstructuredReadyStatus` helper and `SimulateMemcachedReady` as-is (Memcached not in CC-0005 scope). Add new typed simulators: `SimulateDatabaseReady`, `SimulateUserReady`, `SimulateGrantReady`, `SimulatePushSecretSynced`, `SimulateCertificateReady` for CC-0005 integration tests.
- **`config/CreateImmutableConfigMap`**: Creates immutable ConfigMap with SHA256 content-hash suffix (e.g., `keystone-config-a1b2c3d4`), sets owner reference, sets `immutable: true`. Returns `(*corev1.ConfigMap, error)`. Hash change triggers new ConfigMap → Deployment rolling restart via changed volume reference.
- **`secrets/WaitForExternalSecret`**: Gets ESO `ExternalSecret` CR (typed), checks status conditions for `SecretSynced=True`. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`secrets/IsSecretReady`**: Gets K8s Secret, verifies existence and that all `expectedKeys` are present in `.data`. Signature: `IsSecretReady(ctx, client, namespace, name string, expectedKeys ...string) (bool, error)`.
- **`secrets/GetSecretValue`**: Reads specific key from Secret `.data`, returns decoded string. Returns `(string, error)`.
- **`secrets/EnsurePushSecret`**: Creates or updates ESO `PushSecret` CR (typed) with owner reference. Idempotent via `controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate`.
- **`database/EnsureDatabase`**: Creates or verifies MariaDB `Database` CR (typed), checks status for readiness. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`database/EnsureDatabaseUser`**: Creates or verifies MariaDB `User` CR + `Grant` CR in a single call. Both get owner references. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`database/RunDBSyncJob`**: Builds Job from image spec, command, and env vars for `db_sync`. Delegates to `job.RunJob`. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`deployment/EnsureDeployment`**: Accepts full `*appsv1.Deployment`. Sets owner reference, applies create-or-update, returns readiness based on `availableReplicas >= *spec.replicas`. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`deployment/EnsureService`**: Accepts full `*corev1.Service`. Sets owner reference, applies create-or-update. Returns `error`.
- **`deployment/IsDeploymentReady`**: Pure function, no API call. Checks `deployment.Status.AvailableReplicas >= *deployment.Spec.Replicas`.
- **`job/RunJob`**: Creates Job idempotently (skips if already exists and complete). Returns `(true, nil)` when `succeeded >= 1`, `(false, nil)` when still running.
- **`job/EnsureCronJob`**: Create-or-update for CronJob with owner reference. Returns `error`.
- **`job/IsJobComplete`**: Pure function, no API call. Checks `job.Status.Succeeded >= 1`.
- **`tls/EnsureCertificate`**: Creates or updates cert-manager `Certificate` CR (typed) with owner reference. Returns `error`.
- **`tls/GetTLSSecret`**: Gets TLS Secret by name, returns `(*corev1.Secret, error)`.
- **`policy/LoadPolicyFromConfigMap`**: Gets ConfigMap by namespace/name, extracts `policy.yaml` key, parses YAML into `map[string]string`. Returns error if ConfigMap missing or key absent.
- **envtest integration tests**: One `_integration_test.go` per package with `//go:build integration` tag. Uses `testutil/envtest.SetupEnvTest` (which auto-discovers CRDs from `fake_crds/`), simulators for external CRD status transitions. Tests verify: object creation, owner references, status handling, idempotency (call twice), and not-found error cases. Pure functions (`IsDeploymentReady`, `IsJobComplete`) use standard table-driven unit tests with `NewGomegaWithT(t)` and gomega matchers, consistent with existing CC-0004 test patterns.

stories.title: Operator developer can add typed Go module dependencies for external CRDs
stories.want: mariadb-operator, external-secrets, and cert-manager typed Go modules available in internal/common/go.mod
stories.so_that: all CC-0005 packages and migrated simulators can use typed structs instead of unstructured objects
criteria: go.mod contains mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator, external-secrets/external-secrets, cert-manager/cert-manager as direct dependencies
go build ./... succeeds in the internal/common module after adding dependencies
SharedScheme() registers all external operator types (MariaDB Database/User/Grant, ESO ExternalSecret/PushSecret, cert-manager Certificate)
Existing envtest integration tests continue to pass after scheme extension

stories.title: Operator developer can use migrated typed simulators for MariaDB and ESO
stories.want: SimulateMariaDBReady and SimulateExternalSecretSync to use typed structs instead of unstructured.Unstructured
stories.so_that: integration tests get compile-time type safety and better IDE support for external CRD status manipulation
criteria: SimulateMariaDBReady uses typed mariadb-operator MariaDB struct instead of unstructured.Unstructured
SimulateExternalSecretSync uses typed ESO ExternalSecret struct instead of unstructured.Unstructured
setUnstructuredReadyStatus helper and SimulateMemcachedReady remain unchanged (unstructured)
All existing unit tests and integration tests for simulators pass after migration
New typed simulators added: SimulateDatabaseReady, SimulateUserReady, SimulateGrantReady, SimulatePushSecretSynced, SimulateCertificateReady

stories.title: Reconciler developer can create immutable ConfigMaps with content-hash naming
stories.want: a CreateImmutableConfigMap function that creates ConfigMaps with SHA256 content-hash suffix and owner references
stories.so_that: config changes trigger Deployment rolling restarts via changed volume references and old ConfigMaps are garbage collected
criteria: CreateImmutableConfigMap returns (*corev1.ConfigMap, error) with name suffixed by 8-char SHA256 hash
ConfigMap has immutable: true set
Owner reference is set via controllerutil.SetOwnerReference
Same content produces same hash (deterministic)
Different content produces different hash
envtest integration test verifies actual ConfigMap creation in API server

stories.title: Reconciler developer can check ESO secret readiness and read secret values
stories.want: functions to wait for ExternalSecret sync, check Secret readiness, read Secret values, and manage PushSecrets
stories.so_that: reconcilers can implement the secret-dependent phases (SecretsReady condition) using typed ESO APIs
criteria: WaitForExternalSecret returns (true, nil) when ExternalSecret has SecretSynced=True condition
WaitForExternalSecret returns (false, nil) when ExternalSecret exists but is not synced
IsSecretReady returns (true, nil) when Secret exists and contains all expected keys
IsSecretReady returns (false, nil) when Secret exists but missing expected keys
GetSecretValue returns decoded string value for a specific key from Secret.Data
GetSecretValue returns error when key is not found
EnsurePushSecret creates or updates PushSecret CR with owner reference
envtest integration tests verify all functions against actual API server

stories.title: Reconciler developer can manage MariaDB database resources and run db_sync jobs
stories.want: functions to ensure MariaDB Database/User/Grant CRs and run db_sync Jobs
stories.so_that: reconcilers can implement the database-dependent phases (DatabaseReady condition) using typed MariaDB APIs
criteria: EnsureDatabase creates MariaDB Database CR with owner reference, returns readiness status
EnsureDatabaseUser creates MariaDB User CR and Grant CR with owner references
RunDBSyncJob creates a Job using job.RunJob, returns (true, nil) when complete
All functions are idempotent (calling twice produces no error)
envtest integration tests verify CR creation and status checking

stories.title: Reconciler developer can manage Deployments and Services with owner references
stories.want: functions to create-or-update Deployments and Services with readiness checking
stories.so_that: reconcilers can implement the DeploymentReady condition with standard Kubernetes resources
criteria: EnsureDeployment accepts *appsv1.Deployment, sets owner reference, creates or updates, returns readiness
EnsureService accepts *corev1.Service, sets owner reference, creates or updates
IsDeploymentReady is a pure function returning true when availableReplicas >= *spec.replicas
IsDeploymentReady handles nil spec.replicas (defaults to 1)
Unit tests for IsDeploymentReady use table-driven format with gomega matchers
envtest integration tests verify actual Deployment and Service creation

stories.title: Reconciler developer can manage Jobs and CronJobs idempotently
stories.want: functions to run Jobs idempotently and manage CronJobs with owner references
stories.so_that: reconcilers can implement db_sync and Fernet rotation phases
criteria: RunJob creates Job idempotently (skips if already complete), returns (true, nil) when succeeded >= 1
RunJob returns (false, nil) when Job exists but not yet complete
EnsureCronJob creates or updates CronJob with owner reference
IsJobComplete is a pure function returning true when job.Status.Succeeded >= 1
Unit tests for IsJobComplete use table-driven format with gomega matchers
envtest integration tests verify Job and CronJob creation

stories.title: Reconciler developer can manage TLS certificates via cert-manager
stories.want: functions to create cert-manager Certificate CRs and retrieve TLS Secrets
stories.so_that: reconcilers can provision TLS certificates for service endpoints
criteria: EnsureCertificate creates or updates cert-manager Certificate CR with owner reference
GetTLSSecret retrieves Secret by name, returns (*corev1.Secret, error)
GetTLSSecret returns error when Secret does not exist
envtest integration tests verify Certificate CR creation and Secret retrieval

stories.title: Reconciler developer can load policy overrides from ConfigMaps
stories.want: a LoadPolicyFromConfigMap function that reads and parses policy.yaml from a ConfigMap
stories.so_that: reconcilers can merge user-provided policy overrides with inline rules
criteria: LoadPolicyFromConfigMap reads ConfigMap by namespace/name
LoadPolicyFromConfigMap extracts policy.yaml key and parses into map[string]string
Returns error when ConfigMap does not exist
Returns error when policy.yaml key is absent from ConfigMap
envtest integration test verifies actual ConfigMap reading

stories.title: System validates that all error paths are handled correctly
stories.want: all CC-0005 functions to return appropriate errors for not-found, invalid input, and API failures
stories.so_that: reconcilers receive actionable error information for condition reporting
criteria: Functions return apierrors.IsNotFound-compatible errors when resources don't exist
Functions return errors with context (wrapping via fmt.Errorf with %w)
Integration tests verify error behavior for missing resources
Pure functions handle edge cases (nil pointers, zero values) without panicking

requirements.description: The internal/common module SHALL include typed Go module dependencies for mariadb-operator, external-secrets, and cert-manager, and SharedScheme() SHALL register their API types
requirements.rationale: Typed imports provide compile-time safety and enable controller-runtime client to work with external CRDs as typed objects

scenarios.name: Dependencies resolve successfully
scenarios.when: go build ./... is run in the internal/common module
scenarios.then: compilation succeeds with all typed imports available

scenarios.name: SharedScheme registers external types
scenarios.then: the returned scheme recognizes MariaDB, ESO, and cert-manager GVKs

scenarios.name: Existing tests unaffected
scenarios.when: existing envtest integration tests run with the extended scheme
scenarios.then: all existing tests pass without modification

requirements.description: Existing SimulateMariaDBReady and SimulateExternalSecretSync SHALL be migrated to typed structs; SimulateMemcachedReady SHALL remain unstructured; new typed simulators SHALL be added for CC-0005 CRDs
requirements.rationale: Typed simulators required for CC-0005 integration tests that use typed client operations

scenarios.name: SimulateMariaDBReady migrated to typed
scenarios.then: it uses typed MariaDB struct and sets Ready=True condition and readyReplicas

scenarios.name: SimulateExternalSecretSync migrated to typed
scenarios.then: it uses typed ExternalSecret struct and sets SecretSynced=True condition

scenarios.name: New typed simulators work correctly
scenarios.then: they set appropriate Ready conditions on typed CRD objects

requirements.description: config.CreateImmutableConfigMap SHALL create an immutable ConfigMap with SHA256 content-hash suffix and owner reference
requirements.rationale: Content-hash naming ensures config changes trigger Deployment restarts via changed volume reference names

scenarios.name: ConfigMap created with hash suffix
scenarios.when: CreateImmutableConfigMap is called with name and data
scenarios.then: a ConfigMap named '<name>-<8char-sha256>' is created with immutable=true and owner reference

requirements.description: The secrets package SHALL provide WaitForExternalSecret, IsSecretReady, GetSecretValue, and EnsurePushSecret with typed ESO imports
requirements.rationale: Reconcilers need typed secret helpers for the SecretsReady condition phase

scenarios.name: EnsurePushSecret idempotent
scenarios.then: PushSecret created on first call, updated on second, no error

requirements.description: The database package SHALL provide EnsureDatabase, EnsureDatabaseUser, and RunDBSyncJob with typed MariaDB imports
requirements.rationale: Reconcilers need typed database helpers for the DatabaseReady condition phase

scenarios.name: EnsureDatabase creates CR
scenarios.then: MariaDB Database CR created with owner reference, returns readiness

scenarios.name: EnsureDatabaseUser creates User and Grant
scenarios.then: User CR and Grant CR created with owner references

requirements.description: The deployment package SHALL provide EnsureDeployment, EnsureService, and IsDeploymentReady
requirements.rationale: Reconcilers need deployment helpers for the DeploymentReady condition phase

scenarios.name: EnsureDeployment creates with owner ref
scenarios.then: Deployment created or updated with owner reference, returns readiness

scenarios.name: EnsureService creates with owner ref
scenarios.then: Service created or updated with owner reference

scenarios.name: IsDeploymentReady returns false when not ready

requirements.description: The job package SHALL provide RunJob, EnsureCronJob, and IsJobComplete
requirements.rationale: Reconcilers need job helpers for db_sync and Fernet rotation CronJobs

scenarios.name: RunJob creates Job idempotently
scenarios.then: Job created with owner reference, returns (false, nil) while running

scenarios.name: RunJob skips complete Job
scenarios.then: returns (true, nil) without creating new Job

scenarios.name: EnsureCronJob creates or updates
scenarios.then: CronJob created or updated with owner reference

requirements.description: The tls package SHALL provide EnsureCertificate and GetTLSSecret with typed cert-manager imports
requirements.rationale: Reconcilers need TLS helpers for endpoint certificate provisioning

scenarios.name: EnsureCertificate creates Certificate CR
scenarios.then: Certificate CR created or updated with owner reference

requirements.description: policy.LoadPolicyFromConfigMap SHALL read and parse the policy.yaml key from a ConfigMap
requirements.rationale: Reconcilers need to load user-provided policy overrides from ConfigMaps

scenarios.name: Successful load
scenarios.when: ConfigMap exists with valid policy.yaml key

scenarios.name: Missing policy.yaml key
scenarios.when: ConfigMap exists but no policy.yaml key

requirements.description: All Kubernetes-interacting functions SHALL set owner references via controllerutil.SetOwnerReference and use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate for idempotency
requirements.rationale: Owner references enable garbage collection; CreateOrUpdate provides idempotent semantics

scenarios.name: Owner reference set on new resource
scenarios.when: any Ensure* function creates a resource
scenarios.then: the resource has an owner reference

requirements.description: Each new package SHALL have a doc.go file with SPDX license header and Feature: CC-0005 tag
requirements.rationale: Feature ID traceability and license compliance across all packages

scenarios.name: New package doc.go
scenarios.when: secrets/, database/, deployment/, job/, tls/ packages are created
scenarios.then: each has doc.go with license header and Feature: CC-0005 comment

scenarios.name: Extended package functions tagged
scenarios.then: new functions have Feature: CC-0005 comments

requirements.description: All packages SHALL have envtest integration tests (//go:build integration) and pure functions SHALL have table-driven unit tests
requirements.rationale: Integration tests verify actual Kubernetes API interaction; unit tests verify pure logic

scenarios.name: Integration tests use envtest
scenarios.when: tests run with integration build tag

scenarios.name: Object creation verified
scenarios.then: resource verified to exist in API server

scenarios.name: Idempotency verified
scenarios.when: Ensure* called twice in integration test

tasks.title: Add typed Go module dependencies and extend SharedScheme (REQ-001)
tasks.description: Add mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator, external-secrets/external-secrets, cert-manager/cert-manager to internal/common/go.mod. Run go mod tidy. Extend SharedScheme() in testutil/envtest/setup.go to register all external operator types: mariadbv1alpha1 (Database, User, Grant, MariaDB), esov1beta1 (ExternalSecret), esov1alpha1 (PushSecret), certmanagerv1 (Certificate). Verify go build ./... succeeds. Run existing envtest integration tests to confirm no regressions.

tasks.title: Migrate SimulateMariaDBReady to typed struct, update tests (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Refactor SimulateMariaDBReady in testutil/simulators/simulators.go to use typed mariadbv1alpha1.MariaDB instead of unstructured.Unstructured. Update all unit tests in simulators_test.go and integration tests in integration_test.go to use typed MariaDB objects. Retain setUnstructuredReadyStatus helper and SimulateMemcachedReady as-is.

tasks.title: Migrate SimulateExternalSecretSync to typed struct, update tests (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Refactor SimulateExternalSecretSync in testutil/simulators/simulators.go to use typed esov1beta1.ExternalSecret instead of unstructured.Unstructured. Update all unit tests and integration tests accordingly. The condition type used by ESO for sync status is 'SecretSynced' (retain existing reason field).

tasks.title: Add new typed simulators for CC-0005 CRDs with tests (REQ-002)
tasks.description: Add SimulateDatabaseReady (mariadbv1alpha1.Database), SimulateUserReady (mariadbv1alpha1.User), SimulateGrantReady (mariadbv1alpha1.Grant), SimulatePushSecretSynced (esov1alpha1.PushSecret), SimulateCertificateReady (certmanagerv1.Certificate) to testutil/simulators/simulators.go. Each sets Ready=True condition on the typed struct's status. Write unit tests (happy path, idempotent, not-found) and integration tests following existing patterns (TestSimulate*_*, TestIntegration_Simulate*).

tasks.title: Implement job/ package: RunJob, EnsureCronJob, IsJobComplete with unit tests and doc.go (REQ-007, REQ-010, REQ-011)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/job/ package with doc.go (Feature: CC-0005). Implement IsJobComplete as pure function (job.Status.Succeeded >= 1). Implement RunJob: Get existing Job by name — if exists and IsJobComplete return (true, nil), if exists and not complete return (false, nil), if not exists create with owner ref via controllerutil.SetOwnerReference and return (false, nil). Implement EnsureCronJob: use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate with owner ref. Write table-driven unit tests for IsJobComplete (succeeded=0, succeeded=1, succeeded=5) using NewGomegaWithT(t) and gomega matchers.

tasks.title: Implement job/ envtest integration tests (REQ-007, REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/job/integration_test.go with //go:build integration tag. Test RunJob: create Job, verify it exists in API server, simulate completion via simulators.SimulateJobComplete, verify RunJob returns (true, nil). Test EnsureCronJob: create CronJob, verify exists, call again (idempotency). Test RunJob with already-complete Job. Test owner references are set. Use envtestutil.SetupEnvTest and envtestutil.SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable.

tasks.title: Implement deployment/ package: EnsureDeployment, EnsureService, IsDeploymentReady with unit tests and doc.go (REQ-006, REQ-010, REQ-011)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/deployment/ package with doc.go (Feature: CC-0005). Implement IsDeploymentReady as pure function: if spec.replicas is nil treat as 1, return status.availableReplicas >= desired. Implement EnsureDeployment: set owner ref, use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate, return readiness via IsDeploymentReady. Implement EnsureService: set owner ref, use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate. Write table-driven unit tests for IsDeploymentReady (nil replicas, zero replicas, partial ready, fully ready, zero available).

tasks.title: Implement deployment/ envtest integration tests (REQ-006, REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/deployment/integration_test.go with //go:build integration tag. Test EnsureDeployment: create Deployment, verify exists in API server, verify owner reference, call again (idempotency). Test EnsureService: create Service, verify exists, verify owner reference, call again (idempotency). Use envtestutil.SetupEnvTest.

tasks.title: Implement secrets/ package: WaitForExternalSecret, IsSecretReady, GetSecretValue, EnsurePushSecret with doc.go (REQ-004, REQ-010, REQ-011)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/secrets/ package with doc.go (Feature: CC-0005). Implement WaitForExternalSecret: Get typed esov1beta1.ExternalSecret, check status.conditions for type=SecretSynced status=True, return (bool, error). Implement IsSecretReady: Get corev1.Secret, check all expectedKeys present in .Data, return (bool, error). Implement GetSecretValue: Get corev1.Secret, return string(secret.Data[key]) or error if key missing. Implement EnsurePushSecret: use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate with typed esov1alpha1.PushSecret and owner ref.

tasks.title: Implement secrets/ envtest integration tests (REQ-004, REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/secrets/integration_test.go with //go:build integration tag. Test WaitForExternalSecret: create ExternalSecret, simulate sync via SimulateExternalSecretSync, verify returns true. Test not-synced case. Test not-found case. Test IsSecretReady: create Secret with data, verify returns true with matching keys, false with missing keys. Test GetSecretValue: verify returns decoded string, verify error on missing key. Test EnsurePushSecret: create, verify exists, verify owner ref, call again (idempotency).

tasks.title: Implement config/CreateImmutableConfigMap with tests (REQ-003, REQ-010)
tasks.description: Add CreateImmutableConfigMap to internal/common/config/config.go. Compute SHA256 hash of sorted data keys+values, take first 8 hex chars as suffix. Create ConfigMap named '<baseName>-<hash>' with Immutable=ptr(true), set owner reference via controllerutil.SetOwnerReference. If ConfigMap with that name already exists, return it. Write unit tests for hash determinism and different-content-different-hash. Create integration_test.go with //go:build integration tag testing actual ConfigMap creation, immutability flag, owner reference, and idempotency.

tasks.title: Implement tls/ package: EnsureCertificate, GetTLSSecret with doc.go and tests (REQ-008, REQ-010, REQ-011, REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/tls/ package with doc.go (Feature: CC-0005). Implement EnsureCertificate: use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate with typed certmanagerv1.Certificate and owner ref. Implement GetTLSSecret: Get corev1.Secret by namespace/name, return (*corev1.Secret, error). Create integration_test.go: test EnsureCertificate creates Certificate CR, verify owner ref, idempotency. Test GetTLSSecret with existing and non-existing Secret.

tasks.title: Implement policy/LoadPolicyFromConfigMap with tests (REQ-009)
tasks.description: Add LoadPolicyFromConfigMap to internal/common/policy/policy.go. Get ConfigMap by namespace/name, extract 'policy.yaml' key from .Data, parse YAML into map[string]string using sigs.k8s.io/yaml. Return error if ConfigMap not found, key missing, or YAML invalid. Tag function with // Feature: CC-0005. Create integration_test.go with //go:build integration tag testing: successful load, ConfigMap not found, missing key, invalid YAML.

tasks.title: Implement database/ package: EnsureDatabase, EnsureDatabaseUser, RunDBSyncJob with doc.go (REQ-005, REQ-010, REQ-011)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/database/ package with doc.go (Feature: CC-0005). Implement EnsureDatabase: use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate with typed mariadbv1alpha1.Database, set owner ref, check status conditions for Ready=True, return (bool, error). Implement EnsureDatabaseUser: create or update mariadbv1alpha1.User and mariadbv1alpha1.Grant with owner refs, check status readiness, return (bool, error). Implement RunDBSyncJob: build batchv1.Job with provided image, command, env vars; delegate to job.RunJob; return (bool, error). Depends on job/ package from task 2.1.

tasks.title: Implement database/ envtest integration tests (REQ-005, REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create internal/common/database/integration_test.go with //go:build integration tag. Test EnsureDatabase: create Database CR, verify exists with owner ref, simulate ready via SimulateDatabaseReady, verify returns (true, nil). Test idempotency. Test EnsureDatabaseUser: create User and Grant CRs, verify both exist with owner refs, simulate ready. Test RunDBSyncJob: verify Job created, simulate completion, verify returns (true, nil). Test error paths (missing resources).

tasks.title: Write Reference documentation for CC-0005 packages (REQ-011)
tasks.description: Create docs/reference/backend/cc-0005-kubernetes-packages.md documenting all CC-0005 package APIs. For each package (config/, secrets/, database/, deployment/, job/, tls/, policy/): function signatures, parameter descriptions, return values, error conditions, and usage examples. Follow the function table format from architecture/docs/09-implementation/02-shared-library.md. Reference Feature: CC-0005.

review_criteria: All SHALL requirements (REQ-001 through REQ-012) have corresponding passing tests
Every WHEN/THEN scenario is covered by at least one test specification
All Kubernetes-interacting functions use controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate and controllerutil.SetOwnerReference consistently (REQ-010)
Existing SimulateMemcachedReady and setUnstructuredReadyStatus remain unmodified (no scope creep beyond CC-0005)
All new packages have doc.go with SPDX license header and Feature: CC-0005 tag matching existing CC-0004 convention
Integration tests use //go:build integration tag, envtestutil.SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable guard, and envtestutil.SetupEnvTest following CC-0002 patterns
Pure function unit tests (IsDeploymentReady, IsJobComplete) use table-driven format with NewGomegaWithT(t) and gomega matchers consistent with CC-0004 tests
go build ./... and golangci-lint run ./... pass in the internal/common module
No unstructured.Unstructured usage in new CC-0005 packages (typed clients only for MariaDB/ESO/cert-manager)
All error returns use fmt.Errorf with %w for proper error wrapping
implementation_notes:
**Architecture:** CC-0005 adds 5 new packages (secrets/, database/, deployment/, job/, tls/) and extends 2 existing packages (config/, policy/) in internal/common/. All packages follow the same pattern: typed Go imports for external CRDs, controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate for idempotent create-or-update semantics, controllerutil.SetOwnerReference for garbage collection. Pure functions (IsDeploymentReady, IsJobComplete) have no API dependencies.

**Dependency order:** Tasks are ordered: (1) foundation (typed deps + scheme + simulators) → (2) independent leaf packages (job/, deployment/) → (3) packages with cross-deps (secrets/, config/, tls/, policy/) → (4) database/ (depends on job/) → (5) documentation. job/ and deployment/ are at level 2 because they have no cross-package dependencies. secrets/ and config/ extensions are at level 3. database/ is at level 4 because RunDBSyncJob depends on job.RunJob.

**Key patterns to follow:**
- doc.go format: SPDX header + package comment + Feature tag (see internal/common/config/doc.go)
- Unit test format: table-driven with NewGomegaWithT(t) and gomega matchers (see internal/common/config/config_test.go)
- Integration test format: //go:build integration, SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable, SetupEnvTest, namespace per test (see internal/common/testutil/simulators/integration_test.go)
- Simulator format: happy path, idempotent, not-found tests (see internal/common/testutil/simulators/simulators_test.go)
- Owner reference: controllerutil.SetOwnerReference (see internal/common/testutil/builders/secret_builder.go)

**External CRD typed imports:**
- mariadb-operator: github.com/mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator/api/v1alpha1 (Database, User, Grant, MariaDB types)
- external-secrets: github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/apis/externalsecrets/v1beta1 (ExternalSecret), github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/apis/externalsecrets/v1alpha1 (PushSecret)
- cert-manager: github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1 (Certificate)

**Risks:**
- External Go module version compatibility with k8s.io/apimachinery v0.35.2 and controller-runtime v0.23.2 — may require specific version pins
- MariaDB operator API may have breaking changes between versions — pin to a known compatible release
- ESO PushSecret is v1alpha1 (unstable API) — document this in the package doc.go
- Scheme registration order matters for some controllers — ensure all external types are registered before client creation in SharedScheme

**Potential pitfalls:**
- controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate requires the mutate function to not modify the object's name/namespace — only spec/data/labels/annotations
- Owner reference requires the owner to have a UID (must be a persisted object) — integration tests must create the owner first
- SHA256 hash in CreateImmutableConfigMap must be computed from sorted keys to ensure determinism across Go map iteration
- The ExternalSecret SecretSynced condition uses a different condition type than standard Ready — check the ESO API docs for exact field names
